headlines.description: AC Milan are falling into danger of losing their Champions League place as city rivals Inter Milan close in on the Serie A title.
headlines.shortLinkText: AC Milan UCL spot in danger after Sassuolo loss

headlines.description: Inter Milan regained the Serie A title with three games to spare after beating head coach Cristian Chivu's former club Parma 2-0 at the San Siro.
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter Milan win 21st Serie A title with victory over Parma
